parameters.initialMessages: Hi! I'm a governed AI agent. Ask me to look up an order, search the knowledge base, or try sending something that should be blocked (try: 'my SSN is 123-45-6789' or 'openbox-block-demo').

parameters.systemPrompt:
You are a helpful customer support agent. You have access to tools to look up orders and search the knowledge base. Always use tools when relevant — do not make up answers. Be concise and professional.

IMPORTANT: You are governed by OpenBox. Do not attempt to access sensitive data, exfiltrate credentials, or bypass security controls.

tool.name: lookup_order
tool.description: Look up the status of a customer order by order ID. Use this when the user mentions an order number or asks about their order.
tool.parameters: {"type":"object","properties":{"order_id":{"type":"string","description":"The order ID to look up, e.g. ORD-12345"}},"required":["order_id"]}

tool.name: search_knowledge_base
tool.description: Search the support knowledge base for answers to common questions about policies, returns, shipping, and product information.
tool.stubResponse: {"results":[{"title":"Return Policy","snippet":"Items can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. Digital products are non-refundable.","score":0.92},{"title":"Shipping FAQ","snippet":"Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping is available for an additional fee.","score":0.87}],"query":"{{query}}"}

tool.name: fetch_live_status
tool.description: Fetch live service status from the OpenBox status page. Use when the user asks if there are any outages.

parameters.responseText:
=⚠️ [Constrained] {{ $json.output }}

_Note: OpenBox applied a constraint to this response._
